headline: Faster dashboards, simpler onboarding, and clearer API documentation—built from your feedback.

themes.user_facing_summary: We've optimized your dashboard and workspace interactions. Dashboard load times are now 67% faster, org settings load instantly thanks to Redis caching, and workspace member listing is snappier for larger teams.
supporting_changes: Reduce dashboard p95 latency from 2.4s to 800ms via DB call batching
Add Redis caching layer to org-settings API
Eliminate N+1 query in workspace member listing endpoint

themes.user_facing_summary: Getting started is now streamlined. Signup is down to 2 steps from 5, and we've added guided tooltips on your first dashboard to help you find the metrics that matter most.
supporting_changes: Add inline tooltips on first-run dashboard for top 4 metrics
Defer non-essential profile fields to post-signup

themes.user_facing_summary: Integration is now easier with clearer API documentation that explains the authentication model upfront, reducing friction during initial setup.
supporting_changes: Update API quickstart to reflect new auth model

notable_changes: Dashboard p95 latency reduced from 2.4s to 800ms — directly addressing your #1 performance complaint
Signup flow streamlined from 5 steps to 2, reducing abandonment at the critical step-3 conversion point
Workspace member listing is ~30% faster for teams with 50+ members
First-run dashboard now includes inline guidance for your most-used metrics
API quickstart documentation completely rewritten to clarify the authentication model
customer_voice: Your Q2 feedback highlighted critical pain points: dashboard sluggishness (your #1 NPS complaint), signup abandonment (losing 3 signups weekly at step 3), and confusion around API authentication during integrations. This release addresses all three.
